HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PAUL AVERY'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PAUL AVERY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (D206)

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THE ANSWER FILED BY DEFT, PAUL AVERY WAS STRICKEN FOR NON PAYMENT OF FEES. THERE ARE NO OTHER FILINGS TO STRIKE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathryn Quetel for Morgan Fong, who is present.
Drexel Bradshaw for Kyle Breuleux, who is present
Defendant Paul Avery is not present in court this date.

Settlement conference held. Case not settled. Trial date of 12/22/08 is maintained. Counsel for defendant Kyle Breuleux informs the clerk that they requests to waive a jury trial. The clerk advises counsel to bring that request up with the Presiding Judge at trial call on 12/22/08.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
